texto: I was washing outside in the darkness,the sky burning with rough stars,and the starlight, salt on an axe-blade.The cold overflows the barrel.The gate's locked,the land's grim as its conscience.I don't think they'll find the new weaving,finer than truth, anywhere.Star-salt is melting in the barrel,icy water is blackening,death's growing purer, misfortune saltier,the earth's moving nearer to truth and to dread.
explicacao: Citação de Innokenty Annensky sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I was washing outside in the darkness,the sky burning with rough stars,and the starlight, salt on…” articula reflexao, winter, barrel em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao-noturna.
